title: Ultimate Minecarts
description: Complete overhaul of Minecarts. Attach them with chain and use the Furnace Minecart for faster travel!
body:
### This Mod completely overhauls Minecarts, especially the Furnace Minecart.
****
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UlkWqB67qMw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

****
# 🚂 FEATURES
### 🔗 Linking mechanic
**- Use Iron or Copper Chains to attach minecarts together**  
**- Unlike other mods, you can use all chain variants, and copper chains loosen with oxidation.**  
**- Sneak & right-click each cart to link them. The order doesn't matter in most interaction.**  
**- Furnace minecarts will always lead the train so they cannot be attached in the middle or the back**  
### ♨️ Minecart with Blast Furnace
**- Replaces the vanilla item _Minecart with Furnace_**  
**- New model, and GUI bar to show its amount of fuel**  
**- The Furnace Minecart goes twice as fast as the other carts. Powered rails still apply to it**  
**- Use any sort of fuel to power it. Use a water bucket to turn it off instantly**  
**- Particle and Sound effects to each interaction enhance the experience :)**  
**- Vanilla name and recipe are obviously correctly updated**  
### 💥 Collision
**- Minecarts at high speed deal knockback and damage. Drive through annoying mobs!**  
**- They scale with the amount of carts attached. A 7-cart train will kill most enemies.**  
**- Armour, enchantment and potions reduce collision damage**  
**- Can be toggled off in the config**  
****
## ⚙️ CONFIGURATION
**Fully server-side:**
- Toggle Linking mechanic.
- Toggle Collision Damage.
- Choose Furnace Burning Time (default: 72000).
- Choose Furnace Minecart Max Speed (default: 32 blocks per second).
- Choose other Minecarts Max speed (default: 16 blocks per second).
****
### ✨🌐 FULL LANGUAGE SUPPORT
**This mod is now translated into all 142 Minecraft languages.**
- Furnace Minecart will show the correct name in your language
- "Death by Minecart" message has been translated
